title: trigonella polyceratia f. vulgaris
intro: Trigonella polyceratia f. vulgaris, also known as Fenugreek, is an annual herb native to the Mediterranean region and India, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The medicinal properties of Fenugreek include its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and expectorant. The health benefits of Fenugreek include lowering blood sugar levels, improving digestion, and alleviating menopausal symptoms. Herbal preparations of Fenugreek include tea, powder, and oil, which can be used to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
